/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/leetcmd.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/leetcmd.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leetcmd.dir/http_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leetcmd.dir/leetcode_client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leetcmd.dir/config_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leetcmd.dir/gui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/leetcmd.dir/html_parser.cpp.o -o leetcmd  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so -lcurses /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libform.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcurl.so
